summary: 9 unread to kick off Monday morning. Two things need attention: there's a message waiting from LifeMD's front desk that likely needs a reply, and that Texas vehicle registration is still sitting overdue from December — the notice has been unread since January, so handle that soon. Bambu Lab is also teasing a product reveal tomorrow (April 14 at 4 PM CEST) if that's on your radar. The rest is a shipping update on a recent order, a Cults3D download notification, and the usual newsletters.

items.subject: You have a new message from the LifeMD Front Desk
items.snippet: A new message from the LifeMD Front Desk is waiting — click to read it in the patient portal.

items.subject: It's time to renew your registration
items.snippet: Your 2014 Mazda (VIN ending 1256) registration expired December 2025 — this notice has been sitting unread since January and is now overdue.

items.snippet: Bambu Lab is announcing something new on April 14, 2026 at 4 PM CEST — teaser with a notification sign-up link.
